items.caption: An educational diagram titled "the eye diagram" with a blue background. it features a detailed illustration of the human eye, showing various anatomical structures labeled with their names. the eye is depicted in two sections: the left side shows the eye from the front, and the right side shows the eye from the side. the labels include "choroid," "sclera," "conjunctiva," "cornea," "iris," "pupil," "lens," "ciliary muscles," "lachrymal duct," "sclera (white of eye)," "iris (colored part of eye)," "pupil," "lachrymal sac," "naso-lachrymal duct," "ciliary muscles," "lens," "focus lens," "optic nerve," "optic nerve (carries signals to brain)," "lachrymal gland or lacrimal gland," and "lachrymal ducts." the diagram is designed to provide a comprehensive view of the eye's structure and function.
